{{Quote|We're going to liberate that camp.|[[Brenn Tantor]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Force Commander">''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''</ref>}}
This '''holding camp''' was located on [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]] in its [[Abridon capital city|capital city]].

==History==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], following the planet's [[Massacre on Abridon|failed]] [[Uprising on Abridon|attempt]] to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] constructed a holding camp on the outskirts of the planet [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon's]] [[Abridon capital city|capital city]] and began placing Abridons in it.

The camp was referred to as a '''refugee camp''', but its inhabitants were essentially prisoners of the Empire. Most of the inhabitants were likely linked with the [[Abridon Nationalists|Abridon Nationalist]] movement.

Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Rebel [[General/Legends|generals]] [[Tyr Taskeen]] and [[Brenn Tantor]] returned to the planet and [[Liberation of Abridon|drove out]] the Empire. In the process, Tantor discovered the existence of the camp when a prisoner in the [[Abridon Government Center|Government Center]] pled for the release of his family from the facility.

Tantor quickly sent a force east of the city, where the prisoners, including Nationalist leader and former [[Lieutenant governor/Legends|lieutenant governor]] [[Hamman Flatt]], were freed and taken back to the main Rebel base on the planet.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
